name: Srinivas Nelakuditi
headline: Global Head FDE | Exec Sponsor (CIO/CTO/CISO) | Scaled Enterprise AI Deployments | Field Engineering / Global Partner Leader
about: I am a hands-on technical leader with 25+ years of experience building and scaling enterprise data, streaming, and AI platforms. I help large enterprises modernize mission-critical workloads from legacy systems to secure, governed, production-grade platforms. I lead the Forward Deployment Engineering team across the globe.

In my current and recent roles, I work directly with some of the largest strategic customers, including $100M+ commitment accounts, to onboard complex data and AI workloads across Financial Services, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Retail, Telecom, Manufacturing, and Technology. I partner with CIO, CTO, CISO, data, and business leaders to turn modernization goals into production systems with measurable business impact.

My background is deeply technical. I have architected and delivered distributed data systems, real-time streaming platforms, CDC and replication frameworks, enterprise reporting modernization, GenAI deployment patterns, and cloud-native data platforms. I have built systems processing billions of events per day and led implementations spanning Spark, Kafka, Delta Lake, cloud storage, ETL/ELT pipelines, data modeling, governance, observability, and production reliability.

At Databricks, I have helped build and scale repeatable architectures and delivery frameworks for data engineering using Agentic AI, real-time modernization, AI adoption, and agentic transformation. This includes hands-on work in streaming, CDC automation, migration acceleration, RAG, multi-agent systems, tool calling, LLMOps, and secure enterprise deployment. I have also built and led high-impact customer-facing teams, including Resident Solutions Architects and Specialist Solution Architects, while staying close to architecture, delivery strategy, and the hardest technical problems in the field.

Earlier in my career, I led major modernization programs across finance, telecom, and enterprise data platforms, including finance data integration, large-scale reporting platforms, SAP and Oracle integration, cloud migration, and secure high-volume operational systems. Across roles, my focus has remained consistent: build robust platforms, simplify complexity, raise engineering standards, and translate advanced technology into durable business value.
